evals.name: Daemon startup failure
evals.prompt: BIRD fails to start with 'Cannot open configuration file /etc/bird.conf'. What should I check?
evals.expected_output: Suggests checking config path, permissions, and running birdcc lint / bird -p.

evals.name: Config passes lint but behavior wrong
evals.prompt: My BIRD3 config passes lint but BGP routes are not being exported. How do I debug?
evals.expected_output: Collects diagnostics, checks docs, and may escalate to source explorer for export logic.
